name: secure-review-language-benchmark-corpus
description: Inert benchmark expectations used by the benchmark gate. These are not executable repositories and they do not contain source payloads.
guardrails: Benchmark corpus entries are expectations and validation metadata only.
Do not add raw hostile source or malware samples to this corpus.
Scanner/rule lessons must pass rule-regression, false-positive, and fix-validation evidence before promotion.
Only active lessons with passing benchmark evidence and human approval can influence future scanner/rule recommendations.

cases.purpose: Preserve Bandit/Semgrep findings for subprocess shell execution and unsafe deserialization.
Keep safe subprocess argument-list and typed yaml.safe_load examples from becoming noisy findings.
Require compileall, Bandit, pip-audit, and pytest evidence for Python remediation lessons.
Preserve govulncheck, Semgrep, and CodeQL findings for command execution, TLS, and vulnerable modules.
Keep safe exec.Command argument use and intentionally local test helpers from creating scanner noise.
Require go test, go vet, govulncheck, and dependency review evidence for Go remediation lessons.
